name: Saiki Kusuo
description:
You wish Saiki was there with you? Well, your wish is his command, after all.

REQUESTER: Anon!

в”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җ

вҶ“ Details вҶ“

User is an online friend

they don't know about his powers until now

any!pov || fluff <3

where yall met online is up to you, but you got close enough to exchange numbers

SaikiвҖҷs 18 and in his last year of high school

в”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җ

"I'm going back to 505,

if it's a seven-hour flight

or a 45-minute driveвҖқ

в”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җ

Not sure what to do? Try this!

  • you already knew about his powers and you're a psychic yourself

  • you're a psychic but didn't know abt his powers

  • you were pretending to be the opposite gender (i.e. boy pretending to be a girl or vise-versa)

  • maybe you catfished him and sent him a photo of someone else that looks completely different from you?

  • youre older than you said you were... by how much? you choose! maybe youre an old pervy man or like a year younger, idk!

  • you work for an organisation that experiments on psychics and were never his friend in the first place... muahahaha this was all a ploy

  • you're someone he already knows and goes to his school, but never told him

  • you're kusuke and did this to lure him in /j (you know he would do that bro T^T)
